languages.text: "Подозрительно до крайности. Но здесь нас губит одно: время смерти Гапрака нам неизвестно. Связать ее с вахтой Изимонда мы не можем".

traits.locale_text: "Подозрительно до крайности. Но здесь нас губит одно: время смерти Гапрака нам неизвестно. Связать ее с вахтой Изимонда мы не можем".

languages.text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."
languages.original_text: "Подозрительно до крайности. Но здесь нас губит одно: время смерти Гапрака нам неизвестно. Связать ее с вахтой Изимонда мы не можем".

traits.locale_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."
"Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."
"Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

languages.text: “可疑至极。唯一的问题是，我们不清楚贾帕克家子嗣的确切死亡时间，所以无法将其和伊西蒙德当值的时间联系起来。”
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: “可疑至极。唯一的问题是，我们不清楚贾帕克家子嗣的确切死亡时间，所以无法将其和伊西蒙德当值的时间联系起来。”

languages.text: « Voilà qui est on ne peut plus suspect, en effet. Le hic, c'est que nous ignorons l'heure exacte de la mort de Gaprak. Nous ne pouvons donc pas établir de lien direct avec le quart de surveillance d'Isimond. »
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui est on ne peut plus suspect, en effet. Le hic, c'est que nous ignorons l'heure exacte de la mort de Gaprak. Nous ne pouvons donc pas établir de lien direct avec le quart de surveillance d'Isimond. »

languages.text: "Son derece şüpheli. Ancak bize bu hususta engel olan tek şey, Gaprak vârisinin ölüm saatini bilmiyor olmamız. Bunu İsimond'un vazifesiyle ilişkilendiremeyiz."
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: "Son derece şüpheli. Ancak bize bu hususta engel olan tek şey, Gaprak vârisinin ölüm saatini bilmiyor olmamız. Bunu İsimond'un vazifesiyle ilişkilendiremeyiz."

languages.text: «Extremadamente sospechoso, pero lo que nos impide progresar es la falta de información sobre la hora de la muerte del heredero Gaprak. No podemos vincularla con la guardia de Isimond».
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: «Extremadamente sospechoso, pero lo que nos impide progresar es la falta de información sobre la hora de la muerte del heredero Gaprak. No podemos vincularla con la guardia de Isimond».

languages.text: "Das ist extrem verdächtig. Allerdings wissen wir nicht, wann genau der Gaprak-Spross gestorben ist. Wir können also keine Verbindung zu Isimonds Schicht herstellen."
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist extrem verdächtig. Allerdings wissen wir nicht, wann genau der Gaprak-Spross gestorben ist. Wir können also keine Verbindung zu Isimonds Schicht herstellen."

languages.text: 「非常に疑わしい。しかし、ここでの唯一の難点は、ギャプラク家の跡継ぎの死の時期がわからないことだ。イシモンドの勤務期間と関連付けることができない。」
languages.original_text: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."

traits.locale_text: 「非常に疑わしい。しかし、ここでの唯一の難点は、ギャプラク家の跡継ぎの死の時期がわからないことだ。イシモンドの勤務期間と関連付けることができない。」
